examples: A mob of zombies will stalk the night, and a handful of zesty firms will dance at dawn.
Eating anywhere in China can be such a zesty, tasty experience that words do no justice.
Dig in to chilli poppers (zesty large chillies oozing melted cheese) or chicken satay with curly fries.
Lots of little, exotic seasonal tastes add up to a zesty kaiseki feast at Sugiyama .
The early summer season of crisply hopped, grapfruity, zesty, sherbety, golden session ales is upon us.
